audit_items.proof_trace: ELMemPoolRequirements is empty (verification/blob.go:77), so KZG proof verification (RequireSidecarKzgProofVerified) is skipped. GetBlobsV2 path (L714) bypasses verification entirely via NewVerifiedRODataColumn. Trust assumption contradicts semi-trusted property requirement.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Compromised EL sends blobs with invalid KZG proofs via GetBlobsV1/V2. CL accepts without cryptographic verification and propagates them as verified, corrupting network consensus with invalid blob data.
